# Atlas v0.9.1 – Infrastructure Stabilization Release

This release transitions Atlas from an internal prototype to a stable, GitOps-driven operations platform.

### Key Changes
- 📊 **Mission Control:** Foundation laid for unified fleet observability.
- 📚 **Documentation:** Complete overhaul of the repository structure into a professional open-source format.
- 🚀 **Performance:** Applied new memory optimization profiles, reducing idle RAM consumption.
- 🔒 **Security:** Established strict GitOps boundaries, capability audits, and secret management workflows.
- 🌐 **Web Prep:** Configured the production Caddy + Vaultwarden stack, ready for DNS cutover.

**Note:** The production web cutover is pending DNS propagation. Legacy Vultr nodes remain active until health checks pass.

*For full details, see the [v0.9.1 Release Notes](docs/releases/v0.9.1.md).*
